target_model._note: v5 is tuned for Claude Fable 5. The Claude Code default model is set to fable[1m] in settings.json with an availableModels allowlist so a blocked default degrades to Opus 4.8 with a warning instead of failing.
target_model.thinking: always-on adaptive (budget_tokens rejected; control depth with effort)
target_model.refusal_stop_reason: cyber/bio safety classifier may return stop_reason=refusal; Claude Code ships built-in Opus 4.8 fallbacks

model_tiers._note: Alias-only. The Agent/Workflow model override accepts fable|opus|sonnet|haiku, NOT pinned minor versions. Do not hardcode 5.x/4.x numbers anywhere; they drift and cannot be passed.

v5_2_changes: v5.2.1 FIX (frame-capture verified): animation phases moved to a FLOAT clock (perl Time::HiRes, integer fallback) — integer `date +%s` froze motion to 1 fps between Claude Code's ~300ms renders and made the scanner teleport (~126deg/step). Scanner re-timed to 1.8 rad/s (~3.5s bounce); base glow dims to 45% while a scanner/sweep head travels so motion reads. Verified: commit sweep monotonic (1-3-7-10-13-16 / 3s), scanner glides full-range with bounce, decay strictly falling (6.51-4.67-2.06-0.00), render ~56ms.
BRAND: statusline chip now reads 'HYVES CODE V5' (HYVES = Holistic Yield & Validation Engines, an ISYNCSO brand)

LIVE BUDGET (review P1): new UserPromptSubmit hook `superboost-parallelism.sh --turn` re-injects the parallelism budget into context the moment the fan-out posture changes mid-session (wide<->balanced<->narrow<->solo); silent on unchanged turns, so zero token ceremony. Fixes the stale SessionStart-only budget.

FX OUTCOMES (review P4): superboost-fx.sh now reads the PostToolUse tool_response — test/build/lint/typecheck commands emit PASS (bright green) or FAIL (soft red) washes based on the actual result, not just 'a tool ran'
FX PERF (review P5): quiet tools (Read/Grep/Glob/...) skip the python classifier via a bash gate — PostToolUse overhead for them drops ~40ms -> ~7ms

FX MOTION (fx-research): event-typed statusline animation — fanout/deploy washes carry a Larson scanner, commit a one-shot L->R sweep; wash gained a 1D plasma shimmer; linear decay + 4-frame pulse table replaced by smoothstep ease-out + a <10% sine pulse (~0.4 Hz, WCAG 2.3.1-safe). All motion is a pure function of wall-clock, so paused frames are valid stills.

STATUSLINE DENSITY (review P3): new chips from the session JSON — workspace dir basename (ASCII-sanitized), diff churn +N/-N, and a red 200K+ flag when the session exceeds 200k tokens; fractional ctx% no longer mis-colors red (B3)

HYVES BOOT CINEMA (fx-research #1): new hooks/hyves-boot.sh — an nms/Sneakers-style decrypt reveal of the HYVES CODE logo for installer/first-boot moments: alt-screen + hidden cursor + trap restore, DECSET 2026 synchronized-output frames, phosphor-green resolve, live self-test status line, OSC 8 repo hyperlink. Degrades to one plain line on non-TTY/NO_COLOR/narrow. NEVER wired as a session hook (hook stdout is model context; the TUI owns the terminal).

SAFETY-GUARD (review B1/B2/B4/P6, user-approved): rm -rf now also catches quoted/trailing-slash home targets ('$HOME', $HOME/, ~/); `git push +refspec` force-updates are blocked; .env.local/.env.production and other real .env variants are protected (.example/.sample/.template stay writable); calculator-locked files are now also guarded on the Bash path (redirects, tee, sed -i, cp/mv/rm) — read-only access unaffected
SELF-TEST (review P2): banner now verifies jq presence, the PostToolUse superboost-fx binding, and the UserPromptSubmit live-budget binding (three silent-failure gaps)
FX HYGIENE (review P7): Stop hook emits a slate DONE wash at end of turn; SessionEnd clears FX state so no stale effect leaks into the next session's first render
Integrity: hyves-boot.sh added to checksum tracking
v5_1_changes: STATUSLINE v5.1: full-width HUD painted with truecolor BACKGROUNDS — brand/model+effort chips (gold for Fable), wide green->amber->red RAM gradient bar, new ctx-used% / 5h-rate readouts; claims the entire terminal width (COLUMNS from the hook env, minus safety margin)

FX WASHES: active effects flood the free canvas with a quantized, dithered background wash in the effect color (3-cell 'pixels', distance falloff, per-second shimmer, pulse + TTL decay); base strip tints toward the effect so the whole bar breathes; duration tunable via SUPERBOOST_FX_TTL (default 7s)
FIX: safety-guard.sh now fires the red BLOCKED effect itself on a denial (documented since v5.0 but unwired — PostToolUse never runs for a denied call)

FIX: deploy effect false-positives — indigo now requires a real deploy (platform CLI, git push, package-manager deploy task, or a deploy script in command position), not any command merely containing the word 'deploy'
FIX: narrow terminals get a hard-truncated compact line instead of a wrapped bar
Width safety unchanged: visible glyphs pure ASCII, all color zero-width SGR (fg+bg); SUPERBOOST_STATUSLINE_PLAIN=1 escape hatch intact
v5_changes: RETUNED for Claude Fable 5: settings default model -> fable[1m] + availableModels allowlist [fable,opus,sonnet] (blocked default degrades to opus with a warning, not a hard fail)
MODEL TIERING: orchestrator/synthesizer/judge now = fable (was opus); worker=sonnet, explorer=haiku unchanged

DOCTRINE: added Fable-5 prompting doctrine to CLAUDE.md §9 — dependable async sub-agents (delegate + keep working), state-the-objective + the Why, grounded progress claims, no-tidying at high effort, longer minutes-long turns, memory surface, effort sweep
REFUSAL AWARENESS: CLAUDE.md documents the Fable-5 cyber/bio classifier + Claude Code's built-in Opus 4.8 fallback so a refusal is understood, not mistaken for a failure

RAM->PARALLELISM: new superboost-parallelism.sh turns the RAM probe into an actionable fan-out budget (concurrent agents + workflow width + mode); the SessionStart banner now EMITS the budget into context so the orchestrator sizes fan-out to free memory — wide when RAM is ample, solo when tight (a capability plain Fable-5-on-Claude-Code does not offer)

TERMINAL FX: new superboost-fx.sh event emitter (PostToolUse + manual `emit`) writes short-lived colored-effect state (no stdout — zero context pollution); the statusline renders it as a decaying colored activity segment (preflight=blue, fan-out=cyan, commit=green, deploy=indigo, blocked=red, edit=amber, search=violet)

STATUSLINE: now COLORIZED (ANSI truecolor SGR only, no wide/ambiguous-width glyphs so width calc stays exact) with a RAM gradient bar, colored model/cost/capacity, and the live FX segment. SUPERBOOST_STATUSLINE_PLAIN=1 reverts to pure ASCII (honors the v4 width-safety caution).
Rebranded v4.0 -> v5.0; aligned banner, CLAUDE.md, statusline, README, version.json
Integrity: superboost-fx.sh + superboost-parallelism.sh added to checksum tracking
v4_changes: Rebranded v3.x -> v4.0; aligned banner, CLAUDE.md, statusline, version.json
SECURITY: safety-guard.sh PreToolUse hook hard-blocks catastrophic/exfil actions + enforces the calculator lock
FIX: resource-guard.sh exits 2 to actually block (was exit 1, a no-op)
FIX: statusline pure ASCII (removed ANSI + emoji that corrupted TUI width calc)
FIX: removed dead Fast-Mode logic; gitnexus-refresh cwd-guarded, no auto-exec; ram-monitor rotates its log
Model tiering alias-only; config is a git repo
